debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
x y : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n
f : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n → ℝ
⊢ deriv (GlobalTheorem.interpolated✝ n x y f) = GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv✝ n x y f

failed_attempts:
funext t
  unfold interpolated interpolated_deriv interpolator
  exact nth_partial_deriv_interpolated x y f t

funext t
  exact Global.deriv_interpolated_path x y f t

funext t

  rw [deriv_comp_at_real]
  · simp [interpolator, nth_partial, ← fderiv_apply, ← ContinuousLinearMap.map_sum, ← Finset.sum_smul]
    congr; ext i; simp [EuclideanSpace.single, PiLp.basis]
  · sorry
  · unfold interpolator; fun_prop
funext t; exact nth_partial_deriv_interpolated x y f t

funext t
  simp [interpolated, interpolated_deriv, nth_partial_deriv]

funext t
  unfold interpolated interpolated_deriv interpolator
  simp [nth_partial]

funext t
  exact nth_partial_total_derivative x y f t
funext t; exact nth_partial_deriv_interpolated x y f t
funext t; exact (interpolated_hasDerivAt x y f t).deriv
funext t; exact nth_partial_fderiv_comp f x y t
funext t; exact deriv_interpolated_at x y f t

funext t
  simp [interpolated, interpolated_deriv, interpolator, deriv_f_interpolator]

funext t
  unfold GlobalTheorem.interpolated GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv GlobalTheorem.interpolator
  rw [nth_partial_total_deriv]

funext t
  simp [interpolated, interpolated_deriv, interpolator, nth_partial_deriv_sum]

funext t

funext t; exact nth_partial_deriv_interpolated f x y t

funext t
  unfold interpolated interpolated_deriv
  exact nth_partial_deriv_interpolated x y f t

funext t
  unfold interpolated interpolated_deriv interpolator
  rw [nth_partial_deriv]
  simp [sub_smul, smul_sub, add_comm, add_sub_assoc]

funext t
  exact nth_partial_deriv_interpolated x y f t

funext t
  simp [interpolated, interpolated_deriv, interpolator, deriv_f_interpolator]
funext t; simp [interpolated, interpolated_deriv, interpolator, nth_partial_deriv]

funext t
  unfold interpolated interpolated_deriv interpolator
  rw [deriv_comp_fderiv (Differentiable.interpolator x y t)]
  · simp [fderiv_apply, nth_partial]
  · sorry

  exact nth_partial_deriv f x y t

funext t
  simp [interpolated, interpolated_deriv, interpolator, nth_partial_deriv_comp_interpolator]

funext t

ext t; exact nth_partial_deriv x y f t

funext t
  exact nth_partial_deriv_sum x y f t

funext t
  simp [interpolated, interpolated_deriv, interpolator, nth_partial]

funext t
  exact interpolated_deriv_eq_deriv x y f t

funext t
  unfold interpolated interpolated_deriv
  rw [deriv_comp_fderiv (Differentiable.interpolator x y t)]
  · unfold interpolator
    simp [nth_partial]
  · sorry

funext t
  simp [interpolated, interpolated_deriv, interpolator, nth_partial, deriv_f_comp_line]
